revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === {{notice|'''Note that since Switching to dual licensing on June 16, 2009, GFDL-only text added after 1 November 2008 is no longer validly licensed for use on Wikipedia and must be deleted as copyvio, or at the very least blanked using the {{tl|copyvio}} template and listed at [[WP:CP]].'''
This template may still be usable on content imported into Wikipedia ''before'' November 2008. }} This template will add the articles transcluding it to the [[Wikipedia:Categorization|hidden category]] [[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating text from OpenHistory]]. This template should be placed on the '''main''' page of the article. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Attribution templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === {{notice|'''Note that since Switching to dual licensing on June 16, 2009, GFDL-only text added after 1 November 2008 is no longer validly licensed for use on Wikipedia and must be deleted as copyvio, or at the very least blanked using the {{tl|copyvio}} template and listed at [[WP:CP]].'''
This template may still be usable on content imported into Wikipedia ''before'' November 2008. }} This template will add the articles transcluding it to the [[Wikipedia:Categorization|hidden category]] [[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating text from OpenHistory]]. This template should be placed on the '''main''' page of the article. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Attribution templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === {{notice|'''Note that since Switching to dual licensing on June 16, 2009, GFDL-only text added after 1 November 2008 is no longer validly licensed for use on Wikipedia and must be deleted as copyvio, or at the very least blanked using the {{tl|copyvio}} template and listed at [[WP:CP]].'''
This template may still be usable on content imported into Wikipedia ''before'' November 2008. }} This template will add the articles transcluding it to the [[Wikipedia:Categorization|hidden category]] [[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating text from OpenHistory]]. This template should be placed on the '''main''' page of the article. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Attribution templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === {{notice|'''Note that since Switching to dual licensing on June 16, 2009, GFDL-only text added after 1 November 2008 is no longer validly licensed for use on Wikipedia and must be deleted as copyvio, or at the very least blanked using the {{tl|copyvio}} template and listed at [[WP:CP]].'''
This template may still be usable on content imported into Wikipedia ''before'' November 2008. }} This template will add the articles transcluding it to the [[Wikipedia:Categorization|hidden category]] [[:Category:Wikipedia articles incorporating text from OpenHistory]]. {{Documentation subpage}} === Usage === {{notice|'''Note that since Switching to dual licensing on June 16, 2009, GFDL-only text added after 1 November 2008 is no longer validly licensed for use on Wikipedia and must be deleted as copyvio, or at the very least blanked using the {{tl|copyvio}} template and listed at [[WP:CP]].'''
